name: navix
description: Interactive developer onboarding system powered by GitLab Orbit knowledge graphs.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @navix/shared && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @navix/api" "npm run dev -w @navix/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @navix/shared && npm run build -w @navix/api && npm run build -w @navix/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @navix/shared && npm run typecheck -w @navix/api && npm run typecheck -w @navix/web
